case_title: ALYCIA M. MOORE et al VS. CHRISTIE WEST

ROIG, D J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEST, CHRISTIE $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,160.00, THE JUDGMENT REPRESENTS DAMAGES OF $600.00, THE BALANCE OF PLAINTIFFS SECURITY DEPOSIT, PLUS $500.00 DAMAGES PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5.
